title: Unapologetic Smoky Basque French Tofu Eclair
description: Savory eclairs packed with smoky tofu and a hint of Basque flavor, finished with a crunchy Branston pickle garnish.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200C and combine flour, salt, and water in a bowl, mixing until dough forms.
Knead dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes until smooth, then roll into a 1cm thick sheet.
Cut dough into 12 rectangles 4cm x 12cm, place on parchment, bake 15 minutes until puffed, then cool.
While dough bakes, press tofu to remove excess moisture and crumble into a skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic, onion, and smoked paprika to skillet, sauté until onion translucent.
Stir in rosemary, nutritional yeast, lemon zest, and black pepper, cooking another 2 minutes.
Mix in crumbled tofu, cook until heated through and seasoned to taste.
Cut baked pastry rectangles in half lengthwise, fill with tofu mixture, seal edges with a pinch of flour.
Return filled eclairs to oven for 10 minutes, garnish with diced Branston pickle before serving.
